'''Bresallis''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Bresallis system/Legends|Bresallis system]], which was located in the [[Cadma sector/Legends|Cadma sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was plagued by a criminal underworld run by the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]]. [[Ambassador/Legends|Ambassador]] [[Walads]] opposed the Hutts, trying to disrupt their businesses. He was about to make a speech to the government on the subject when the Hutts hired [[Brahle Logris]] to assassinate him.
